programme.title: College Football
programme.desc: The No. 9 Crimson Tide (10-2) and No. 3 Bulldogs (11-1) meet in the SEC championship game for the third time in five years. Alabama is 4-0 against Georgia in SEC title contests. The Bulldogs yielded a total of 22 points in the last three outings.

programme.title: College Football
programme.desc: The Roadrunners face the No. 19 Aggies at Kyle Field. UTSA won a postseason game for a second straight year in 2024, thrashing Coastal Carolina 44-15 in the Myrtle Beach Bowl. Texas A&M went 8-5 in its first year under the supervision of Mike Elko.

programme.title: College Football
programme.desc: No. 19 Texas A&M, led by sophomore quarterback Marcel Reed, welcomes Utah State to Kyle Field for an all-Aggies affair. Reed passed for 289 yards and a career-high four touchdowns in a 42-24 victory over UTSA in Week 1. Utah State topped UTEP 28-16.

programme.title: TrueSouth
programme.desc: A limited series on Southern food and culture. John T. Edge writes and hosts the show and is executive produced by Wright Thompson; Season Five revolves around two food stories told from one place and sets in the conversation to make larger points about Southern beliefs and identities.

programme.title: College Football
programme.desc: The Wolfpack set out to play spoiler once more by visiting the No. 15 Hurricanes. NC State upset then-No. 8 Georgia Tech 48-36 prior to its bye Nov. 1. Freshman Jayden Scott (NCSU) scored and set a new career high with 196 rushing yards in the win.

programme.title: College Football
programme.desc: The Bulldogs visit the No. 6 Aggies. Texas A&M is 4-0 for the first time since 2016 after outlasting Auburn 16-10 in Week 5. Le'Veon Moss (TA&M) ran for 139 yards and a TD. Mississippi State comes off an overtime loss to then-No. 15 Tennessee.

programme.title: TrueSouth
programme.desc: Driving the rolling back roads of southern Kentucky, to gnaw pork shoulder steaks cooked over hickory fires and eat burgers fried in shallow oil; introducing viewers to a cultural microclimate that straddles the Kentucky-Tennessee line.

programme.title: TrueSouth
programme.desc: A bathhouse in Hot Springs, Ark., an odd and endearing resort town tucked in the Ouachita Mountains, west of Little Rock; mobsters once caroused here; Major league teams traveled here for spring training.

programme.title: Live: Unsportsmanlike with Evan, Canty and Michelle

programme.title: Sun Belt Conference Football Media Days
programme.desc: Covering everything you missed from the college gridiron.

programme.title: College Football
programme.desc: Marcel Reed and the No. 5 Aggies (5-0, 2-0 SEC) brace for the upset-minded Gators (2-3, 1-1). Reed has thrown 11 touchdown passes. Florida comes off a stunning 29-21 victory over then-No. 9 Texas behind sophomore DJ Lagway's two touchdown passes.

programme.title: College Football
programme.desc: The Razorbacks (2-4, 0-2 SEC) host the No. 4 Aggies (6-0, 3-0) for another edition of the Southwest Classic. Texas A&M has won 12 of the last 13 meetings after knocking off Arkansas 21-17 last year. Marcel Reed accounted for all three Aggies TDs.

programme.title: College Football
programme.desc: The No. 3 Aggies (7-0, 4-0 SEC) seek their first 8-0 start since 1992 when they visit the No. 20 Tigers (5-2, 2-2). The home team has won the last eight engagements. Texas A&M quarterback Marcel Reed has accounted for 19 touchdowns, 15 passing.

programme.title: College Football
programme.desc: The No. 3 Aggies (8-0, 5-0 SEC) travel for a showdown with the No. 22 Tigers (6-2, 2-2). Missouri hasn't beaten Texas A&M since 2014, dropping both matches since then. The Aggies have their highest AP ranking since 1995, when they also reached No. 3.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons
programme.desc: John McClane (Bruce Willis) finds himself dangling from the side of a building and must shoot through the glass window to break through to safety; reconstructing the scene using the same Beretta 92 handgun and office glass.

programme.title: Art of Wild
programme.desc: Art of wild is a film series that aims to tell stories about the wild in the most cinematic way possible. To tell the best stories we travel to the most incredible places. It is in the wild places where most won't go that the human spirit is fed. Only a hunter knows what it's like to wake up with the woods, or hear a bull bugle in the graylight, these moments are what make up the beauty of the wil

programme.title: Adrenaline
programme.desc: Experience the heart-pounding action of fair-chase whitetail hunting with host Kyle Wieter and the entire Adrenaline crew as they pursue giant Midwestern bucks. This dedicated team embraces the challenges of the hunt, navigating intense highs, unexpected lows, and the unpredictable nature of these ultimate survival machines.

programme.title: The Most Wanted List
programme.desc: This isn't a highlight reel-it's the real deal. The Most Wanted List takes you into raw, unpredictable hunts where nothing goes as planned and every opportunity is earned. Misses, miles, and moments that matter... this is what chasing the most wanted is all about.

programme.title: Winchester Deadly Passion
programme.desc: Hunting spot-and-stalk mule deer and antelope in Colorado is one of the best ways to kick off the season!

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.desc: On Prince of Wales Island in Alaska, Steve and former producer Morgan Fallon go fishing, stalk Sitka black-tailed deer and prepare a feast.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.desc: Steve and his buddy Ronny Boehme head to southeast Wyoming, where they shoot clays with Gov. Matt Mead before heading out on a sage grouse hunt.

programme.title: Steve's Outdoor Adventures
programme.desc: Steve West hunts with a longtime outfitter, guide, and friend in coastal Alaska for black bear.

programme.title: Elk Camp
programme.desc: Renowned elk caller and professional guide Steve Chappell guides his clients on up-close, bugling elk hunts in Arizona and Colorado. Steve's calling skills and capacity for understanding elk behavior are on display each week.

programme.title: Legends of the Fall
programme.desc: Legends of the Fall is produced with truly die-hard deer hunters in mind. Legends of the Fall chronicles the high-energy hunts and behind-the-scenes action of a dedicated crew of passionate hunters. While the show spotlights a dynamic variety of adrenaline-pumping whitetail bow hunts across North America, it also offers a mix of other big game adventures.
